skill.summary: Develop Solana dApps with React/Next.js, manage wallet connections, build and test programs using Anchor or Pinocchio, and apply SDKs and testing tools per S...

latestVersion.changelog:
Initial release of the Solana Development Skill for AI agents.

- Provides an official, opinionated workflow for Solana dApp and on-chain development, favouring framework-kit, @solana/kit, and modern testing tools.
- Outlines stack defaults and migration recommendations (e.g. preferring Anchor or Pinocchio for programs, isolating web3.js usage).
- Includes detailed task classification and building-block selection procedure.
- Emphasizes security, explicit network handling, and best practices for fee/signing logic and testing.
- Adds supplementary notes for technical reviewers and real-world code review guidance.
